serviceNotes.engine oil: S65 high-rev V8: BMW M maintenance specifies shorter oil intervals than standard 3 Series (often 15,000 km / 12 months EU); track use warrants ~8,000 km changes. Sources: BMW M E9x service literature.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: High-flow V8 intake; ~60,000 km filter planning.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Eight spark plugs; high-performance engine—many schedules specify ~45,000–60,000 km; confirm M supplement.
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: Performance use: inspect every 20,000 km or before track events.
serviceNotes.M-DCT gearbox fluid: E9x M3 with M-DCT (GS7D36SG): DCT fluid service at ~60,000 km for shift quality and clutch longevity.
serviceNotes.manual gearbox fluid: E9x M3 6-speed manual: gear oil replacement at ~60,000 km.
serviceNotes.differential fluids: M limited-slip rear axle: ~60,000 km fluid refresh recommended.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: High-rev engine: preventive coolant maintenance ~100,000 km.
serviceNotes.valve adjustment: S65 uses solid lifters; BMW specifies valve clearance checks at defined intervals—verify the M maintenance table for your model year (planning row ~50,000 km).

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW owner's manual E90/E92/E93 M3 (S65) — Oil Service 15,000 km / 12 months EU M specification; differs from standard E90 CBS maximum
serviceSources.micro filter: BMW owner's manual E9x M3 (S65) — cabin microfilter per M maintenance schedule (~30,000 km)
serviceSources.brake fluid: BMW owner's manual E9x M3 — brake fluid every 24 months (DOT 4)
serviceSources.air cleaner element: BMW M maintenance literature E9x M3 — engine air filter interval scaled to M oil services (60,000 km = four 15,000 km M oil intervals)
serviceSources.spark plugs: BMW M maintenance literature E9x M3 (S65) — eight spark plugs; 45,000 km M interval
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW M maintenance literature — performance brake inspection 20,000 km planning
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW M maintenance literature — 20,000 km inspection planning
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW M maintenance literature — M vehicle check 30,000 km (shorter than non-M 60,000 km)
serviceSources.M-DCT gearbox fluid: BMW TIS / M-DCT service specification — DCT fluid service ~60,000 km (GS7D36SG)
serviceSources.manual gearbox fluid: BMW M workshop literature — M3 6-speed manual gear oil ~60,000 km preventive
serviceSources.differential fluids: BMW M workshop literature — M variable M limited-slip rear axle ~60,000 km
serviceSources.coolant flush: BMW M maintenance literature — high-rev S65; REC ~100,000 km preventive
serviceSources.valve adjustment: BMW TIS S65 — solid lifters; valve clearance inspection per M maintenance table (~50,000 km planning row)
